name: nextjs-app
description: Reference Next.js App Router application for @better-seo/core and @better-seo/next: demonstrates Metadata, NextJsonLd, layout and page SEO merging, dynamic routes, and Playwright end-to-end checks. Used only inside the monorepo for development, docs, and CI; not published to npm.

scripts.assets: node ../../packages/better-seo-cli/dist/cli.cjs og "better-seo.js example" -o public/og-example.png --site-name "Demo" && node ../../packages/better-seo-cli/dist/cli.cjs icons assets/logo.svg -o public --no-manifest
